title: Prehistoric Revival - A Prehistoric Fauna Add-On
description: A cloning and revival add-on for Prehistoric Fauna
body:
Prehistoric Revival is an add-on for the dinosaur mod Prehistoric Fauna. Using a DNA Extractor, the player can now collect DNA using the Prehistoric Fauna fossils. Combining the DNA with eggs, seeds, saplings, water buckets, or a bucket of milk in the Cultivator will result in the plants, dinosaur eggs, animal embryos, or buckets of fish. All extinct plants and animals are able to be gained with this method.

 

This is an official add-on for Prehistoric Fauna. You can find the mod here.

 

Join the Prehistoric Fauna Discord for more updates!

 

What players can and cannot do without permission:

  * Take screenshots or record videos * Add this mod to a modpack, so long as it has proper credit and can link back to here * Cannot recompile and reupload the mod elsewhere * Cannot take assets from this mod to use elsewhere
